security.html.security.a.logo-link.RGl2aW5j: Divinci ™ - Create your own custom AI
security.html.security.p.QXQgRGl2: At Divinci AI, security is not just a feature—it's a fundamental principle that guides everything we do. We understand that when you choose our platform for your AI needs, you're entrusting us with sensitive information. We take this responsibility seriously and have implemented comprehensive security measures to protect your data.
security.html.security.p.WW91ciBk: Your data is encrypted at rest and in transit using industry-standard encryption protocols. We implement multiple layers of encryption to ensure that your information remains secure at all times.
security.html.security.li.QUVTLTI1: AES-256 encryption for data at rest
security.html.security.li.VExTIDEu: TLS 1.3 for all data in transit
security.html.security.li.U3RyaWN0: Strict access controls based on the principle of least privilege
security.html.security.li.QXV0b21h: Automated account deprovisioning when employees leave
security.html.security.p.V2UgaW1w: We implement stringent access controls to ensure that only authorized personnel can access your data. Our systems are designed with the principle of least privilege, meaning employees only have access to the specific data they need to perform their job functions.
security.html.security.li.TXVsdGkt: Multi-factor authentication (MFA) required for all staff
security.html.security.li.Q29tcHJl: Comprehensive audit logging of all access events
security.html.security.p.T3VyIGlu: Our infrastructure is built on secure, enterprise-grade cloud platforms with redundant systems and continuous monitoring. We implement defense-in-depth strategies to protect against various types of threats.
security.html.security.li.RGlzYXN0: Disaster recovery and business continuity planning
security.html.security.p.V2UgYWRo: We adhere to industry standards and regulatory requirements to ensure that our security practices meet or exceed expectations. Our compliance program is regularly reviewed and updated to address new regulations.
security.html.security.p.V2UgaGF2: We have implemented specialized security measures specifically designed for AI systems and data processing. These include safeguards against prompt injection, model poisoning, and data extraction attacks.
security.html.security.li.T3V0cHV0: Output filtering and content safety measures
security.html.security.p.Rm9yIGEg: For a comprehensive overview of our security practices, download our security whitepaper. This document provides detailed information about our approach to security, privacy, and compliance.
security.html.security.p.SWYgeW91: If you have any security concerns or would like to report a vulnerability, please contact our security team using the information below.

logo-font-demo.html.logo-font-demo.p.font-description.Q29ybW:
Cormorant Garamond is an elegant serif typeface inspired by Claude Garamont's designs from the 16th century.
                It features high contrast between thick and thin strokes, with refined, sophisticated letterforms that evoke
                a sense of timelessness and classic literary authority. The organic terminals and open counters create
                a feeling of spaciousness and clarity.
logo-font-demo.html.logo-font-demo.p.font-description.UGxheW:
Playfair Display is a sophisticated serif with distinctive character and organic details.
                It was designed in the transitional style with high contrast between thick and thin strokes.
                The letterforms have a dignified presence with a touch of warmth and personality, making it
                ideal for a brand that wants to convey authority, intelligence, and a touch of classic elegance.
logo-font-demo.html.logo-font-demo.p.font-description.TWFyY2:
Marcellus is a Roman inscriptional serif typeface with a modern twist. It combines classical proportions
                with contemporary design sensibilities. The letterforms have a natural, flowing quality with subtle details
                that give it a gentle, organic character. Its balanced, open forms create an approachable yet sophisticated presence,
                perfect for a brand that values both heritage and innovation.
logo-font-demo.html.logo-font-demo.p.font-description.TGl0ZX:
Literata is a refined serif typeface designed for reading comfort with a distinctive literary quality.
                Its balanced letterforms blend traditional book typography with modern characteristics.
                The slightly condensed proportions and carefully crafted details give it a smart, authoritative feel
                while maintaining approachability. This font conveys intellectual depth and thoughtful precision.
logo-font-demo.html.logo-font-demo.p.font-description.R2lsZG:
Gilda Display is a graceful serif typeface with elegant, well-proportioned letterforms.
                It features classic design principles with a contemporary sensibility, creating a balance
                between traditional authority and modern clarity. The refined details and open counters
                give it an inviting, accessible character while maintaining a sense of sophistication
                and intellect.
logo-font-demo.html.logo-font-demo.p.font-description.Q2luem:
Cinzel is an elegant typeface inspired by classical Roman inscriptions. It combines
                the timeless quality of classical letterforms with subtle contemporary touches.
                The capitals are particularly distinctive, with graceful proportions and refined details.
                Cinzel conveys a sense of permanence, authority, and dignity, making it perfect
                for a brand that values heritage, quality, and enduring principles.
logo-font-demo.html.logo-font-demo.p.font-description.RnJhdW:
Fraunces is a sophisticated serif typeface with personality and character. It features
                a blend of organic, flowing elements with more structured forms, creating a distinctive
                balance between playfulness and sophistication. The high contrast between thick and thin
                strokes adds visual interest, while the open, inviting letterforms create an approachable,
                warm feeling, ideal for a brand that's both intellectual and human-centered.

internships.html.internships.p.internship-subtitle.R2Fpbi: Gain hands-on experience in cutting-edge AI projects at Divinci AI, with mentorship from industry experts and deliverables for your academic portfolio.
internships.html.internships.p.RGl2aW5j: Divinci AI is dedicated to accelerating human discovery through innovative AI solutions. Our mission is to empower organizations with advanced AI tools that enhance learning, creativity, and decision-making, fostering a future where technology amplifies human potential.
internships.html.internships.p.T3VyIFN1: Our Summer 2025 AI Internship Program offers USC students a unique opportunity to work on real-world AI projects with industry experts. This 10-week, unpaid internship provides valuable experience, mentorship, and deliverables for academic credit or university presentation.
internships.html.internships.p.SW50ZXJu: Interns will work primarily remotely, with optional in-person meetings in Santa Monica, CA for those able to attend. All projects are designed to provide meaningful contributions to both your learning and our technology.
internships.html.internships.p.QXMgYW4g: As an intern, you'll work on one of the following innovative AI projects:
internships.html.internships.p.RXhwbG9y: Explore large language models by replicating Anthropic's circuit tracing research and developing interpretability tools using SHAP and Hugging Face.
internships.html.internships.p.VGhpcyBw: This project will help you understand the inner workings of sophisticated language models and contribute to the growing field of AI explainability.
internships.html.internships.p.QnVpbGQg: Build your technical portfolio with GitHub deliverables that demonstrate your skills to future employers. Create projects that showcase your abilities in AI development.
internships.html.internships.p.TGVhcm4g: Learn how to enhance AI capabilities by providing relevant context from external sources, a critical component in enterprise AI applications.
internships.html.internships.p.VHJhbnNm: Transform internal RAG and fine-tuning APIs into secure, customer-ready systems with webhooks, implementing OAuth 2.0 and industry-standard security.
internships.html.internships.p.R2FpbiBl: Gain experience in API security, authentication protocols, and creating developer-friendly interfaces for enterprise customers.
internships.html.internships.p.V2Ugc2Vl: We seek motivated USC undergraduate or graduate students in computer science, data science, engineering, or related fields with:
internships.html.internships.li.QmFzaWMg: Basic proficiency in Python or TypeScript and familiarity with Git
internships.html.internships.li.QSBwYXNz: A passion for AI, machine learning, or API development
internships.html.internships.li.U3Ryb25n: Strong problem-solving skills and eagerness to learn in a collaborative, mentor-driven environment
internships.html.internships.li.SW50ZXJl: Interest in contributing to impactful projects with real-world applications
internships.html.internships.p.V29yayBv: Work on cutting-edge AI technologies with real-world applications and challenges. Learn from industry professionals who have built production AI systems.
internships.html.internships.p.WW91ciB3: Your work can be structured to fulfill academic requirements for course credit or as a presentation for relevant university programs (subject to your department's approval).
internships.html.internships.p.UmVjZWl2: Receive guidance from experienced engineers and AI specialists who will help you develop both technical and professional skills in a supportive environment.
internships.html.internships.p.VG8gYXBw: To apply for the Summer 2025 AI Internship Program at Divinci AI, please contact Michael D. Mooring at mike@divinci.app by May 12, 2025.
internships.html.internships.p.SW4geW91: In your application email, please include:
internships.html.internships.li.QSBicmll: A brief statement (1-2 paragraphs) explaining why you're interested in the internship and which project area interests you most
internships.html.internships.li.QW55IHJl: Any relevant coursework, projects, or experience
internships.html.internships.li.WW91ciBH: Your GitHub profile or portfolio (if available)
internships.html.internships.h2.cta-heading.Sm9pbiBV: Join Us to Shape the Future of AI
internships.html.internships.p.cta-description.VGhpcyBp: This internship is your opportunity to gain valuable experience in AI development while contributing to innovative projects at Divinci AI.

hybrid-logo-fonts.html.hybrid-logo-fonts.p.QmxlbmRp: Blending modern SaaS aesthetics with cultural sophistication
hybrid-logo-fonts.html.hybrid-logo-fonts.p.font-description.Q2F:
Cabin is a humanist sans-serif that balances modern tech aesthetics with warmer, more organic touches.
                It maintains the clean, approachable feel needed for SaaS applications while introducing subtle
                character through its letterforms. The balanced proportions and slightly rounded terminals create
                a friendly yet professional impression that works well across digital interfaces.
hybrid-logo-fonts.html.hybrid-logo-fonts.span.comparison-text.T: More organic terminals, slightly warmer character
hybrid-logo-fonts.html.hybrid-logo-fonts.p.font-description.U3B:
Spectral is a versatile serif typeface designed with contemporary proportions but with clear literary heritage.
                It bridges the gap between modern tech aesthetics and cultural sophistication through its balanced
                stroke contrast and refined details. The open letterforms ensure excellent readability in digital
                environments while the subtle serifs add character and distinction.
hybrid-logo-fonts.html.hybrid-logo-fonts.span.comparison-text.T: More contemporary proportions, slightly more tech-oriented
hybrid-logo-fonts.html.hybrid-logo-fonts.p.font-description.TWF:
Manrope is a modern geometric sans-serif with subtle humanist touches. It maintains the clean,
                minimal aesthetics of contemporary SaaS design while incorporating natural stroke modulation and
                carefully crafted letter shapes that add warmth and character. Its precise, technical construction
                is softened with organic terminals and open counters.
hybrid-logo-fonts.html.hybrid-logo-fonts.p.font-description.U29:
Sora is a geometric sans-serif with organic softening that creates a perfect blend of technical
                precision and human touch. Its letterforms maintain the rational, structured approach needed for
                modern tech applications while incorporating subtle details and curves that add personality and cultural
                depth. The balanced vertical proportions ensure it works well across interfaces.
hybrid-logo-fonts.html.hybrid-logo-fonts.p.font-description.RE0:
DM Serif Display offers a contemporary take on traditional serif typography, bringing cultural
                sophistication into modern tech design. The high contrast between thick and thin strokes creates
                visual interest, while the overall construction maintains a clean, current aesthetic. It's
                particularly effective for logos and headlines where distinctiveness is important.
hybrid-logo-fonts.html.hybrid-logo-fonts.p.font-description.Q29:
Commissioner is a variable sans-serif with humanist touches and refined details. It provides
                the clean, systematic approach valued in SaaS contexts while incorporating subtle character
                variations and organic stroke transitions. The wide range of weights offers flexibility
                while maintaining a cohesive, sophisticated visual system.
hybrid-logo-fonts.html.hybrid-logo-fonts.span.comparison-text.U: Systematic approach with subtle organic details
hybrid-logo-fonts.html.hybrid-logo-fonts.p.font-description.UGV:
Petrona is a contemporary serif with a warm, approachable character. It brings literary
                and cultural associations while maintaining modern proportions and technical precision.
                The moderate contrast and softened terminals create a balanced blend of tech-forward
                design with organic, human qualities that make it inviting and sophisticated.

cookies.html.cookies.p.VGhpcyBD: This Cookie Policy explains how Divinci AI ("we", "us", or "our") uses cookies and similar technologies to recognize you when you visit our website at https://divinci.ai ("Website"). It explains what these technologies are and why we use them, as well as your rights to control our use of them.
cookies.html.cookies.p.SW4gc29t: In some cases, we may use cookies to collect personal information, or that becomes personal information if we combine it with other information.
cookies.html.cookies.p.Q29va2ll: Cookies set by the website owner (in this case, Divinci AI) are called "first-party cookies". Cookies set by parties other than the website owner are called "third-party cookies". Third-party cookies enable third-party features or functionality to be provided on or through the website (e.g., advertising, interactive content, and analytics). The parties that set these third-party cookies can recognize your computer both when it visits the website in question and also when it visits certain other websites.
cookies.html.cookies.p.V2UgdXNl: We use first and third-party cookies for several reasons. Some cookies are required for technical reasons in order for our Website to operate, and we refer to these as "essential" or "strictly necessary" cookies. Other cookies also enable us to track and target the interests of our users to enhance the experience on our Online Properties. Third parties serve cookies through our Website for advertising, analytics, and other purposes. This is described in more detail below.
cookies.html.cookies.p.VGhlc2Ug: These cookies are used to enable you to share pages and content that you find interesting on our Website through third-party social networking and other websites. These cookies may also be used for advertising purposes.
cookies.html.cookies.p.VGhlIHNw: The specific types of first and third-party cookies served through our Website and the purposes they perform are described in the Cookie Consent Manager.
cookies.html.cookies.p.WW91IGhh: You have the right to decide whether to accept or reject cookies. You can exercise your cookie rights by setting your preferences in the Cookie Consent Manager. The Cookie Consent Manager allows you to select which categories of cookies you accept or reject. Essential cookies cannot be rejected as they are strictly necessary to provide you with services.
cookies.html.cookies.p.VGhlIENv: The Cookie Consent Manager can be found in the notification banner and on our website. If you choose to reject cookies, you may still use our website though your access to some functionality and areas of our website may be restricted. You may also set or amend your web browser controls to accept or refuse cookies.
cookies.html.cookies.p.TW9zdCB3: Most web browsers allow some control of most cookies through the browser settings. To find out more about cookies, including how to see what cookies have been set, visit www.aboutcookies.org or www.allaboutcookies.org.
cookies.html.cookies.p.RmluZCBv: Find out how to manage cookies on popular browsers:
cookies.html.cookies.p.VGhpcmQg: Third parties may serve cookies on your computer or mobile device to serve advertising through our Website. These companies may use information about your visits to this and other websites in order to provide relevant advertisements about goods and services that you may be interested in. They may also employ technology that is used to measure the effectiveness of advertisements. This can be accomplished by them using cookies or web beacons to collect information about your visits to this and other sites in order to provide relevant advertisements about goods and services of potential interest to you.
cookies.html.cookies.p.VGhlIGlu: The information collected through this process does not enable us or them to identify your name, contact details or other details that directly identify you unless you choose to provide these.
cookies.html.cookies.h2.SG93IG9m: How often will you update this Cookie Policy?
cookies.html.cookies.p.V2UgbWF5: We may update this Cookie Policy from time to time in order to reflect, for example, changes to the cookies we use or for other operational, legal or regulatory reasons. Please therefore re-visit this Cookie Policy regularly to stay informed about our use of cookies and related technologies.
cookies.html.cookies.p.VGhlIGRh: The date at the top of this Cookie Policy indicates when it was last updated.
cookies.html.cookies.p.SWYgeW91: If you have any questions about our use of cookies or other technologies, please email us at privacy@divinci.ai.

careers.html.careers.p.careers-subtitle.QXQgRGl2: At Divinci AI, we're building the future of human-AI collaboration. Join us on our mission to make AI accessible and valuable for businesses of all sizes.
careers.html.careers.p.section-content.QXQgRGl2: At Divinci AI, we're building a collaborative, innovative, and inclusive workplace where everyone can thrive. Our culture is defined by our shared values and commitment to creating AI technology that empowers humans rather than replacing them.
careers.html.careers.p.value-description.V2UgZW5j: We encourage bold thinking and creative problem-solving. We're not afraid to challenge the status quo and push the boundaries of what's possible with AI.
careers.html.careers.p.value-description.V2UgYmVs: We believe the best work happens when diverse perspectives come together. We foster a collaborative environment where ideas are shared openly and everyone's voice is heard.
careers.html.careers.p.value-description.V2UncmUg: We're driven by the opportunity to make a meaningful impact on how businesses leverage AI. Every team member plays a crucial role in bringing this vision to life.
careers.html.careers.p.section-content-light.V2UgYmVs: We believe in taking care of our team. Here are some of the benefits and perks we offer to Divinci AI employees:
careers.html.careers.p.benefit-description.V2Ugb2Zm: We offer unlimited PTO, company holidays, and paid parental leave because we believe in work-life balance and taking time to recharge.
careers.html.careers.p.benefit-description.V2Ugc3Vw: We support remote work with the option for in-office collaboration at our Santa Monica headquarters, giving you the flexibility to work where you're most productive.
careers.html.careers.p.benefit-description.V2UgcHJv: We provide an annual learning stipend for conferences, courses, and books, plus regular opportunities for professional development.
careers.html.careers.p.benefit-description.UmVndWxh: Regular team-building activities, quarterly offsites, and annual company retreats to foster connection and collaboration among team members.
careers.html.careers.p.section-content.Sm9pbiBv: Join our team and help shape the future of human-AI collaboration. We're looking for passionate individuals across various disciplines:
careers.html.careers.p.job-description.V2UncmUg: We're seeking a Product Manager to drive our product vision and roadmap. You'll work closely with customers, engineers, and designers to build AI solutions that solve real business problems.
careers.html.careers.p.job-description.Sm9pbiBv: Join our customer success team to help customers implement and get value from our AI platform. You'll work closely with customers to understand their goals and ensure their success.
careers.html.careers.p.job-description.SGVscCB1: Help us create intuitive interfaces for complex AI capabilities. You'll design experiences that make AI accessible to users with varying levels of technical expertise.
careers.html.careers.p.section-content.V2Ugb2Zm: We offer internship opportunities for students and recent graduates interested in AI, software development, and product design. Our internships provide hands-on experience working on real projects with mentorship from our team.
careers.html.careers.p.internship-description.T3VyIDE: Our 10-week Summer Internship Program offers USC students hands-on experience in cutting-edge AI projects, including AI interpretability, RAG API development, and secure customer-facing systems. Work directly with our engineering teams on projects that make a real impact.
careers.html.careers.a.internship-link.TGVhcm4g: Learn more about our internship program
careers.html.careers.p.section-content.V2UndmUg: We've designed our interview process to be thorough yet respectful of your time. Here's what you can expect when applying to Divinci AI:
careers.html.careers.p.step-description.T3VyIHJl: Our recruiting team reviews your application and assesses your experience against the role requirements. We aim to respond to all applications within one week.
careers.html.careers.p.step-description.QSAzMC1t: A 30-minute call with a recruiter to discuss your background, the role, and determine mutual fit. We'll answer any questions you have about Divinci AI and the position.
careers.html.careers.p.step-description.RGVwZW5k: Depending on the role, you'll complete a take-home assignment or a live technical interview. We design our assessments to be relevant to the actual work you'd do at Divinci AI.
careers.html.careers.p.step-description.QSBzZXJp: A series of interviews with team members and cross-functional partners. We'll dive deeper into your experience and assess team fit while giving you the opportunity to meet potential colleagues.
careers.html.careers.p.step-description.QSBjb252: A conversation with a senior leader to discuss your career goals and how you can contribute to Divinci AI's mission. This is also your chance to ask any remaining questions about the company and role.
careers.html.careers.p.step-description.SWYgdGhl: If there's mutual interest in moving forward, we'll extend an offer and discuss compensation, benefits, and start date. We're committed to providing a competitive package that recognizes your value.
careers.html.careers.p.quote-text.V29ya2lu: Working at Divinci AI has been an incredible journey. I love the collaborative culture and the opportunity to solve complex technical challenges alongside talented colleagues who are passionate about making AI accessible to everyone.
careers.html.careers.p.quote-text.V2hhdCBJ: What I appreciate most about Divinci AI is how much autonomy and trust we're given. We have the freedom to explore new ideas and approaches, while still maintaining a strong sense of collective purpose. It's the perfect balance of independence and teamwork.

ai-safety-ethics.html.ai-safety-ethics.h1.document-title.QUkgU: AI Safety, Trust and Ethics Statement
ai-safety-ethics.html.ai-safety-ethics.p.document-subtitle.RGl:
Divinci AI's Commitment to Responsible and
                                Trustworthy AI
ai-safety-ethics.html.ai-safety-ethics.span.U3RhbmRh: Standards Compliant · NIST Framework Aligned · ISO/IEC Informed
ai-safety-ethics.html.ai-safety-ethics.p.commitment.QXQgRGl2:
At Divinci AI, we prioritize safe, ethical, and
                                    transparent AI solutions. Our products,
                                    including web and mobile applications, serve
                                    diverse use cases in healthcare and other
                                    sensitive fields. This document details our
                                    commitment to using only licensed data, ensuring
                                    rigorous safety measures, and implementing
                                    robust human interfaces in our
                                    Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) and
                                    Fine-Tuned language models.
ai-safety-ethics.html.ai-safety-ethics.p.commitment-company.RG:
Divinci AI is committed to building enterprise-grade 
                                    AI solutions with the highest standards of safety,
                                    ethics, and transparency. Our platform powers business 
                                    applications across regulated industries including healthcare, 
                                    financial services, and legal sectors. This document outlines 
                                    our enterprise commitment to data licensing compliance, 
                                    comprehensive safety protocols, and robust governance frameworks 
                                    for our enterprise Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) and 
                                    Fine-Tuned language model deployments.
ai-safety-ethics.html.ai-safety-ethics.h2.licensed-data.MS4gTG: 1. Licensed Data and Responsible AI Development
ai-safety-ethics.html.ai-safety-ethics.p.V2UgYXJl:
We are committed to using only licensed and
                                    ethically sourced data in training our AI
                                    models. Our data governance practices ensure
                                    that every dataset is verified for legitimacy,
                                    licensing compliance, and relevance. This
                                    approach aligns with guidelines like those set
                                    by ANSI for trustworthy AI, emphasizing
                                    transparency and ethical sourcing
                                    (Guidelines for Developing Trustworthy AI
                                        ,
                                    Recommended Practice for AI Governance
                                        ).
ai-safety-ethics.html.ai-safety-ethics.p.RGl2aW5j:
Divinci AI fosters trust by creating transparent
                                    AI solutions. We provide clear user guidelines,
                                    outlining system capabilities, limitations, and
                                    ethical constraints. For healthcare
                                    applications, we follow ANSI's standards to
                                    align our systems with trusted guidelines on
                                    data privacy, bias mitigation, and compliance
                                    with relevant regulatory standards
                                    The Use of AI in Health Care
                                        .
ai-safety-ethics.html.ai-safety-ethics.li.Q29udGVu:
Content Management: We
                                        provide tools for reviewing, editing, and
                                        controlling the information our AI models
                                        generate, helping to align responses with
                                        ethical standards.
ai-safety-ethics.html.ai-safety-ethics.li.VGVzdGlu:
Testing and Validation:
                                        Every model goes through rigorous testing to
                                        minimize bias, confabulation, and
                                        misinformation
                                        (Emotion enabled multimodal user
                                            interface
                                            ,
                                        AI Risk Management Framework
                                            ).
ai-safety-ethics.html.ai-safety-ethics.li.UmVsZWFz:
Release Management: Our
                                        models undergo controlled release processes
                                        to ensure they are only deployed once they
                                        meet our high safety and reliability
                                        standards.
ai-safety-ethics.html.ai-safety-ethics.h2.safety-features.My4g:
3. Safety Features in Consumer and
                                    Patient-Facing Models
ai-safety-ethics.html.ai-safety-ethics.p.Rm9yIGFw:
For applications involving consumers or
                                    patients, Divinci AI incorporates robust safety
                                    features such as:
ai-safety-ethics.html.ai-safety-ethics.li.VHJhbnNw:
Transparency and Explainability:
                                        We strive for clarity in AI responses,
                                        helping users understand how decisions are
                                        made and why specific recommendations
                                        appear. This commitment reduces
                                        over-reliance and ensures user trust
                                        (Guidelines for Developing Trustworthy
                                            AI
                                            ,
                                        The Use of AI in Health Care
                                            ).
ai-safety-ethics.html.ai-safety-ethics.a.VGhlIFVz: The Use of AI in Health Care
ai-safety-ethics.html.ai-safety-ethics.li.TW9kZXJh:
Moderation for Harmful Content:
                                        We actively moderate against harmful
                                        outputs, including any content that may be
                                        biased, inappropriate, or potentially
                                        misleading. Our systems implement safeguards
                                        to monitor and restrict outputs that could
                                        negatively impact users
                                        (AI Risk Management Framework
                                            ).
ai-safety-ethics.html.ai-safety-ethics.p.T3VyIGFk:
Our adherence to the AI governance framework
                                    aligns with standards like those from NIST and
                                    IEEE, focusing on accountability, transparency,
                                    and robust performance metrics. Regular audits
                                    of our systems ensure that our AI models remain
                                    aligned with Divinci AI's ethical standards
                                    throughout their lifecycle
                                    Recommended Practice for AI Governance
                                        .
ai-safety-ethics.html.ai-safety-ethics.p.V2UnZCBs:
We'd like to thank
                                    The Alan Turing Institute's AI Standards
                                        Hub 
                                    for providing invaluable AI standards resources
                                    that have inspired and informed Divinci AI's AI
                                    Safety and Ethics policies.
ai-safety-ethics.html.ai-safety-ethics.a.VGhlIEFs:
The Alan Turing Institute's AI Standards
                                        Hub

about-us.html.about-us.a.logo-link.RGl2aW5j: Divinci ™ - Create your own custom AI
about-us.html.about-us.p.about-subtitle.V2UncmUg: We're building the future of human-AI collaboration, empowering organizations to create custom AI solutions that transform how we learn, work, and innovate.
about-us.html.about-us.p.section-content.QXQgRGl2: At Divinci AI, we believe in the power of artificial intelligence to address critical social challenges and create positive impact in our communities.
about-us.html.about-us.p.section-content.V2UgZW52: We envision a future where AI amplifies human potential rather than replacing it. Our platform enables organizations to create purpose-built AI applications that solve specific challenges, driving innovation and efficiency while maintaining the human touch that makes businesses unique.
about-us.html.about-us.p.section-content.VGhlc2Ug: These principles guide everything we do at Divinci AI, from product development to customer relationships.
about-us.html.about-us.p.value-description.V2UgZGVz: We design AI systems that enhance human capabilities rather than replace them, focusing on collaboration between people and technology.
about-us.html.about-us.p.value-description.V2UgcHVy: We pursue technological advancement not for its own sake, but to solve real problems and create meaningful impact for our customers.
about-us.html.about-us.p.value-description.V2UncmUg: We're committed to developing AI responsibly, with strong ethical guidelines, transparency, and safeguards against potential harms.
about-us.html.about-us.p.value-description.V2UgYnVp: We build for everyone, ensuring our technology is accessible, understandable, and beneficial across diverse user groups and use cases.
about-us.html.about-us.p.value-description.RGF0YSBw: Data protection and privacy are foundational to our platform, with enterprise-grade security built into every layer of our technology.
about-us.html.about-us.p.value-description.V2Ugdmll: We view our relationships with customers as long-term partnerships, collaborating closely to ensure their success with our platform.
about-us.html.about-us.p.section-content.RGl2aW5j: Divinci AI is built by a diverse team of AI researchers, software engineers, product designers, and industry experts committed to making AI accessible and valuable for businesses.
about-us.html.about-us.p.member-bio.TWljaGFl: Michael brings over 15 years of experience in software development and AI research. He founded Divinci AI with a mission to democratize AI for businesses of all sizes.
about-us.html.about-us.p.member-bio.U2FtIGxl: Sam leads Divinci AI's technical strategy and development, with over 15 years of software experience and expertise in machine learning, natural language processing, and scalable systems.
about-us.html.about-us.p.member-bio.U2llcnJh: Sierra leads our customer success team, ensuring organizations achieve their goals with Divinci AI and receive exceptional support throughout their journey.
about-us.html.about-us.p.section-content.VGhlIGpv: The journey of Divinci AI from concept to reality, driven by our passion for making AI accessible and valuable.
about-us.html.about-us.p.RGl2aW5j: Divinci AI continues to grow and evolve, with new features and capabilities being added regularly. We're working with organizations of all sizes to transform their operations through custom AI, while building a community of forward-thinking businesses driving innovation in their industries.
about-us.html.about-us.p.VGhlIGRl: The development of our core technology began, focusing on building a platform that would make creating and deploying custom AI solutions intuitive and accessible without requiring deep technical expertise in machine learning.
about-us.html.about-us.p.V2UgbGF1: We launched our closed beta program with a select group of partner companies across various industries. Their valuable feedback helped us refine our platform and understand the diverse needs of different business sectors.
about-us.html.about-us.p.QWZ0ZXIg: After extensive testing and refinement, Divinci AI officially launched to the public. Our platform's intuitive interface and powerful capabilities quickly gained traction among businesses looking to implement custom AI solutions.
about-us.html.about-us.h3.social-good-title.QUkgZm9y: AI for Impact: Inside LA's Homelessness Prevention Pilot Program
about-us.html.about-us.p.social-good-description.RGl2a:
Divinci AI is proud to support initiatives that use artificial intelligence for social good.
                                    Join us for this upcoming event from AI LA that explores how AI is being used to address
                                    homelessness in Los Angeles through innovative prevention programs.
about-us.html.about-us.p.join-description.V2UncmUg: We're always looking for talented individuals passionate about AI and its potential to transform businesses. Join us in building the future of human-AI collaboration.

What is LLM Quality Assurance?

LLM Quality Assurance is Divinci AI's comprehensive solution for ensuring the reliability, accuracy, and safety of enterprise AI applications. Traditional software QA methods fail to address the unique challenges of LLM-based systems, including hallucinations, bias detection, and non-deterministic outputs.

Our platform provides a complete testing and validation framework specifically designed for AI systems, with automated testing, continuous monitoring, and detailed analytics that help organizations maintain trust in their AI applications. We employ a multi-layered approach combining prompt testing, output validation, factual verification, and behavioral analysis to provide comprehensive quality assurance.

Whether you're developing customer-facing AI assistants, implementing internal knowledge systems, or deploying specialized AI tools, our LLM Quality Assurance platform ensures your applications meet the highest standards of quality and reliability while maintaining compliance with regulatory requirements.

Frequently Asked Questions
How do you keep test coverage current as our AI applications evolve?
How does your system detect AI hallucinations?
Our hallucination detection system uses a multi-layered approach:
Source Verification: We compare AI-generated statements against reliable knowledge sources, including your organization's knowledge base and trusted external sources
Semantic Evaluation: Testing whether responses have the same meaning rather than identical wording
Uncertainty Detection: We identify patterns in language that indicate uncertainty or fabrication
Statistical Testing: Running multiple test iterations and analyzing the distribution of responses

This comprehensive approach catches the vast majority of potential hallucinations before they reach users, with continuous improvements as the system learns from new examples. For regulated industries, we provide specialized verification against industry-specific knowledge sources and regulations.
How does your testing approach handle non-deterministic AI outputs?
Traditional testing relies on exact matching, which doesn't work for LLMs that produce different but equally valid responses to the same input. Our system addresses this through:
Constraint Verification: Checking that outputs meet defined constraints (format, included information, etc.)
Probabilistic Assertions: Testing that responses fall within acceptable probability distributions
Property-based Testing: Verifying that outputs maintain critical properties regardless of exact wording

Our approach recognizes that AI outputs exist within a range of acceptable variations. We help you define what constitutes acceptable variation for your specific use cases and ensure your AI consistently stays within those boundaries.
Can your system handle industry-specific compliance requirements?
Can your system handle industry-specific compliance requirements?
Yes, our LLM Quality Assurance platform includes specialized compliance modules for various industries:
Financial Services: FINRA, SEC, MiFID II, and other financial regulations
Healthcare: HIPAA, HITECH, FDA requirements for medical information
Legal: Legal advice boundaries, jurisdiction-specific requirements
Government: ADA compliance, accessibility standards, service requirements
Retail/E-commerce: FTC guidelines, product claim accuracy, pricing transparency

Each industry module includes pre-built test suites, specialized verification sources, and reporting templates aligned with regulatory requirements. We also provide customization services to address your organization's specific compliance policies and regulatory obligations. All compliance testing is continuously updated as regulations evolve.
How does your system integrate with our existing development process?
Our LLM Quality Assurance platform offers multiple integration points with your development workflow:
CI/CD Integration: Automated testing as part of your build and deployment pipeline
API Access: Programmatic access to all testing capabilities for custom integrations
Developer Tools: IDE plugins and CLI tools for testing during development
Pre-built Integrations: Connectors for common development platforms (GitHub, GitLab, JIRA, etc.)

Our implementation team will work with your development and DevOps teams to create a tailored integration that fits your existing processes. We focus on minimizing disruption while maximizing the value of comprehensive quality assurance. The system can be deployed gradually, starting with specific high-priority applications or test environments before expanding to your full AI portfolio.
How do you keep test coverage current as our AI applications evolve?
Maintaining relevant test coverage for rapidly evolving AI applications is a key challenge. Our approach includes:
Usage-Based Test Generation: Automatically creating new test cases based on actual user interactions
Coverage Analysis: Identifying gaps in test coverage as applications evolve
Continuous Learning: Updating test expectations based on approved AI responses

The system provides regular recommendations for test coverage improvements based on application changes, user feedback, and emerging usage patterns. This ensures your quality assurance evolves in parallel with your AI capabilities, maintaining comprehensive coverage without requiring constant manual updates to test suites.

Optimizing Vector Embeddings for Better Search Results

Vector embeddings have revolutionized information retrieval by enabling semantic search capabilities that understand the meaning behind queries rather than just matching keywords. However, the effectiveness of embedding-based search systems depends heavily on how these embeddings are generated, processed, and indexed. In this technical guide, we'll explore advanced techniques for optimizing vector embeddings to achieve better search relevance, reduced latency, and improved overall system performance.
Before diving into optimization techniques, let's review the key components of a vector embedding pipeline:
Document Processing: Preparing source documents through cleaning, normalization, and chunking
Embedding Generation: Converting text chunks into vector representations using embedding models
Vector Indexing: Building efficient data structures for storing and retrieving vectors
Query Processing: Transforming user queries into vectors and retrieving relevant results
Ranking and Filtering: Post-processing to improve result quality
Optimizing vector embeddings is a multi-faceted challenge that involves trade-offs between relevance, performance, and complexity. For most systems, a layered approach works best:
How you divide documents into chunks significantly impacts retrieval quality. Here are advanced chunking techniques that go beyond simple fixed-length segmentation:
Instead of splitting text at arbitrary character counts, identify semantic boundaries such as paragraphs, sections, or topic shifts. This preserves the contextual integrity of information.

Create chunks at multiple granularity levels (document, section, paragraph) and store these in a hierarchical structure. This enables multi-level retrieval that can return both specific paragraphs and their containing contexts.
Applying domain-specific preprocessing can significantly improve embedding quality:
Entity Normalization: Standardize entity mentions (e.g., "IBM" and "International Business Machines") to improve consistency.
Domain-Specific Tokenization: Use specialized tokenizers for technical, legal, or medical content to better handle domain-specific terms.
Structural Element Preservation: Retain important structural indicators like headings, lists, and tables with special tokens.
The choice of vector index dramatically impacts both search speed and accuracy:
Fine-tune general-purpose embedding models on your domain-specific data to improve relevance for your particular use case.
Combine vector search with keyword-based search for improved precision and recall.
Generate multiple query variations to improve recall for relevant information.
We've benchmarked these optimization techniques across different datasets and use cases. Here are key findings:
Start with intelligent document processing and chunking
Select and potentially fine-tune appropriate embedding models
Implement efficient indexing with metadata filtering capabilities
Add query optimization techniques where needed
Apply dimensionality reduction and quantization selectively based on scale requirements

By carefully applying these optimization techniques, you can significantly improve the relevance and performance of embedding-based search systems. The key is to focus optimization efforts on the most impactful areas for your specific use case and dataset characteristics.

blog/posts/future-of-rag-systems.html.blog/posts/future-of-rag-systems.h1.blog: The Future of RAG Systems: Beyond Simple Document Retrieval
blog/posts/future-of-rag-systems.html.blog/posts/future-of-rag-systems.p.UmV0c: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) has emerged as one of the most transformative applications of large language models, enabling AI systems to reliably access and reason over vast knowledge bases and organizational data. But as the technology matures, we're seeing RAG evolve far beyond its initial implementation as a simple document retrieval mechanism.
blog/posts/future-of-rag-systems.html.blog/posts/future-of-rag-systems.p.QXQgR: At Divinci AI, we're addressing these challenges through our AutoRAG platform, which automatically finds the optimal RAG pipeline for your specific data and use case. Unlike traditional RAG implementations that require extensive manual configuration, AutoRAG evaluates multiple combinations of retrieval and generation strategies to determine what works best with your unique content.
blog/posts/future-of-rag-systems.html.blog/posts/future-of-rag-systems.p.capti: Next-generation RAG systems incorporate multiple specialized components to enhance context retrieval and reasoning.
blog/posts/future-of-rag-systems.html.blog/posts/future-of-rag-systems.p.VHJhZ: Traditional RAG implementations follow a relatively straightforward process: a query comes in, relevant documents are retrieved based on vector similarity, and these documents are provided as context to a large language model to generate a response. This approach works remarkably well for many applications, but it has several limitations:
blog/posts/future-of-rag-systems.html.blog/posts/future-of-rag-systems.li.Q29u: Contextual compression that removes irrelevant portions while preserving key information
blog/posts/future-of-rag-systems.html.blog/posts/future-of-rag-systems.li.U2Vt: Semantic search limitations mean relevant documents are sometimes missed
blog/posts/future-of-rag-systems.html.blog/posts/future-of-rag-systems.li.TGFj: Lack of reasoning about document relationships prevents holistic understanding
blog/posts/future-of-rag-systems.html.blog/posts/future-of-rag-systems.li.Tm8g: No temporal awareness of information age or sequence
blog/posts/future-of-rag-systems.html.blog/posts/future-of-rag-systems.li.SW5h: Inability to reconcile contradictory information from different sources
blog/posts/future-of-rag-systems.html.blog/posts/future-of-rag-systems.p.TmV4d: Next-generation RAG systems don't just retrieve facts; they can synthesize information across documents, identify relationships between concepts, and reason about implications. This enables applications like:
blog/posts/future-of-rag-systems.html.blog/posts/future-of-rag-systems.p.UmF0a: Rather than a single retrieval step, advanced RAG systems employ multi-stage retrieval pipelines that combine different retrieval mechanisms. This approach significantly improves recall and precision by leveraging the strengths of different search methods:
blog/posts/future-of-rag-systems.html.blog/posts/future-of-rag-systems.li.SW5p: Initial broad retrieval using BM25 or other keyword-based methods
blog/posts/future-of-rag-systems.html.blog/posts/future-of-rag-systems.li.RGVu: Dense vector retrieval using embedding models like E5 or text-embedding-ada-002
blog/posts/future-of-rag-systems.html.blog/posts/future-of-rag-systems.li.SHli: Hybrid re-ranking that combines scores from multiple retrieval methods
blog/posts/future-of-rag-systems.html.blog/posts/future-of-rag-systems.li.TExN: LLM-based filtering to assess relevance with more nuanced understanding
blog/posts/future-of-rag-systems.html.blog/posts/future-of-rag-systems.p.VGhpc: This allows the system to include information from many more documents than would fit in a traditional context window, prioritizing the most relevant parts of each document.
blog/posts/future-of-rag-systems.html.blog/posts/future-of-rag-systems.p.QWR2Y: Advanced RAG systems now perform sophisticated query operations before retrieval, including:
blog/posts/future-of-rag-systems.html.blog/posts/future-of-rag-systems.li.QXV0: Automated Pipeline Evaluation to test various combinations of parsing, chunking, retrieval, and generation modules
blog/posts/future-of-rag-systems.html.blog/posts/future-of-rag-systems.li.SHlw: Hypothetical document creation to guide retrieval
blog/posts/future-of-rag-systems.html.blog/posts/future-of-rag-systems.li.UXVl: Query rewriting to better align with the corpus terminology
blog/posts/future-of-rag-systems.html.blog/posts/future-of-rag-systems.p.Rm9yI: For example, a financial analyst might ask about "recent volatility in tech stocks," and the system could retrieve relevant text analyses, stock price charts, news video clips, and earnings call transcripts to provide a comprehensive answer with visualizations.
blog/posts/future-of-rag-systems.html.blog/posts/future-of-rag-systems.p.T25lI: One of the key challenges in RAG systems is managing the context window limitation of large language models. Next-generation RAG systems address this through:
blog/posts/future-of-rag-systems.html.blog/posts/future-of-rag-systems.li.RHlu: Dynamic chunk sizing based on document structure rather than fixed sizes
blog/posts/future-of-rag-systems.html.blog/posts/future-of-rag-systems.li.SW5m: Information fusion from multiple documents into a coherent context
blog/posts/future-of-rag-systems.html.blog/posts/future-of-rag-systems.p.UGVya: Perhaps most exciting is the extension of RAG beyond text to include images, audio, video, and structured data. These multi-modal RAG systems can:
blog/posts/future-of-rag-systems.html.blog/posts/future-of-rag-systems.li.SWRl: Identifies information gaps in its current context
blog/posts/future-of-rag-systems.html.blog/posts/future-of-rag-systems.li.Rm9y: Formulates new search queries to fill those gaps
blog/posts/future-of-rag-systems.html.blog/posts/future-of-rag-systems.li.UmV0: Retrieve and analyze charts, diagrams, and images alongside text
blog/posts/future-of-rag-systems.html.blog/posts/future-of-rag-systems.li.SW50: Integration of structured and unstructured data in unified retrieval systems
blog/posts/future-of-rag-systems.html.blog/posts/future-of-rag-systems.li.UmVw: Repeats until it has gathered sufficient information
blog/posts/future-of-rag-systems.html.blog/posts/future-of-rag-systems.p.VGhpc: This creates a "research loop" similar to how humans approach complex questions, gathering information incrementally until they have enough to provide a comprehensive answer.
blog/posts/future-of-rag-systems.html.blog/posts/future-of-rag-systems.p.capti: Recursive retrieval allows the system to progressively refine its search and gather more relevant information.
blog/posts/future-of-rag-systems.html.blog/posts/future-of-rag-systems.p.VGhlc: These architectural advancements are enabling RAG systems to go far beyond simple document retrieval, creating entirely new classes of applications:
blog/posts/future-of-rag-systems.html.blog/posts/future-of-rag-systems.li.Rmlu: Financial analysis systems that connect market trends with company data
blog/posts/future-of-rag-systems.html.blog/posts/future-of-rag-systems.li.U2Np: Scientific discovery tools that can suggest hypotheses based on disparate research papers
blog/posts/future-of-rag-systems.html.blog/posts/future-of-rag-systems.p.V2l0a: With recursive retrieval, RAG systems can now facilitate exploration of complex information spaces, allowing users to "navigate" through knowledge in a conversational manner:
blog/posts/future-of-rag-systems.html.blog/posts/future-of-rag-systems.p.RWFja: Each follow-up question triggers new retrievals, creating a dynamic exploration experience that adapts to the user's interests.
blog/posts/future-of-rag-systems.html.blog/posts/future-of-rag-systems.li.RXh0: Extract information from video content based on queries
blog/posts/future-of-rag-systems.html.blog/posts/future-of-rag-systems.li.Q29t: Combine information from databases, spreadsheets, and documents
blog/posts/future-of-rag-systems.html.blog/posts/future-of-rag-systems.li.R2Vu: Generate visual and textual responses based on multi-modal retrieval
blog/posts/future-of-rag-systems.html.blog/posts/future-of-rag-systems.p.V2hpb: While these advancements are exciting, several challenges remain in the development of next-generation RAG systems:
blog/posts/future-of-rag-systems.html.blog/posts/future-of-rag-systems.li.Q29t: Computational efficiency as multiple retrieval and reasoning steps increase resource requirements
blog/posts/future-of-rag-systems.html.blog/posts/future-of-rag-systems.li.RXZh: Evaluation complexity since traditional retrieval metrics don't capture reasoning quality
blog/posts/future-of-rag-systems.html.blog/posts/future-of-rag-systems.li.S25v: Knowledge freshness and the need for continuous updating of information sources
blog/posts/future-of-rag-systems.html.blog/posts/future-of-rag-systems.li.QmFs: Balancing exploration and exploitation in recursive retrieval loops
blog/posts/future-of-rag-systems.html.blog/posts/future-of-rag-systems.p.capti: AutoRAG automatically evaluates different RAG modules to find the optimal pipeline for your specific data.
blog/posts/future-of-rag-systems.html.blog/posts/future-of-rag-systems.p.T3VyI: Our approach to RAG optimization includes:
blog/posts/future-of-rag-systems.html.blog/posts/future-of-rag-systems.li.Q29t: Comprehensive Metrics for measuring both retrieval performance (precision, recall, F1) and generation quality (ROUGE, BLEU, semantic similarity)
blog/posts/future-of-rag-systems.html.blog/posts/future-of-rag-systems.li.UUEg: QA Dataset Creation to automatically generate high-quality evaluation data from your corpus
blog/posts/future-of-rag-systems.html.blog/posts/future-of-rag-systems.li.T2Jz: Observability throughout the retrieval and generation process
blog/posts/future-of-rag-systems.html.blog/posts/future-of-rag-systems.li.Q3Vz: Customizability to adapt to specific domains and use cases
blog/posts/future-of-rag-systems.html.blog/posts/future-of-rag-systems.p.VGhlI: The evolution of RAG systems represents a fundamental shift in how we think about AI and knowledge. Rather than simply training larger models with more parameters, RAG architectures leverage the complementary strengths of retrievers and generators to create systems that can access, synthesize, and reason over vast knowledge bases.
blog/posts/future-of-rag-systems.html.blog/posts/future-of-rag-systems.p.QXMgd: As these systems continue to evolve, we're moving toward AI that can conduct genuine research, engage in sophisticated reasoning over retrieved information, and synthesize knowledge in ways that were previously impossible. The future of RAG isn't just about better document retrieval—it's about creating AI systems that can truly serve as knowledge partners, capable of helping us navigate and make sense of the world's information.

How FinTech Startup Streamlined Customer Support with Custom AI
Sierra Hooshiari
Executive Summary

FastFinance, a rapidly growing fintech startup offering SMB lending and financial management tools, faced significant challenges scaling their customer support operations. As their user base expanded, their small support team struggled to maintain response quality and speed while managing an increasingly complex knowledge base.

Divinci AI worked with FastFinance to develop a custom AI support system that combined advanced RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) technology with domain-specific fine-tuning and human-in-the-loop workflows. The results were transformative:
This case study details how Divinci AI and FastFinance collaborated to achieve these results, the specific challenges encountered, and the technical approach that made it possible.
Client Background
Founded in 2021, FastFinance offers a suite of financial tools designed specifically for small and medium-sized businesses, including:
Working capital loans with rapid approval
Cash flow forecasting and management
Automated bookkeeping and reconciliation
Tax optimization and compliance tools
Integration with popular accounting and payment platforms

By 2024, FastFinance had grown to serve over 15,000 businesses across the United States and Canada, with a team of 85 employees. Their support team consisted of just 12 specialists handling approximately 450 support tickets daily.
Key Challenges
Complex Knowledge Domain: Financial products with intricate rules, compliance requirements, and frequent updates
High-Stakes Inquiries: Questions often involved sensitive financial matters requiring accurate responses
Fragmented Knowledge Base: Documentation spread across multiple systems with inconsistent formats
Growing Support Volume: 35% monthly increase in support tickets with fixed staffing constraints

Multi-stage Retrieval: Queries were decomposed and processed through a three-stage retrieval pipeline:
                                    
                                        Initial broad retrieval to identify relevant knowledge areas
                                        Focused retrieval within those areas for specific information
                                        Contextual retrieval to gather supporting details
Project Goals
Reduced onboarding time for new support team members by 60%
Maintain Accuracy: Ensure AI-generated responses meet or exceed 98% accuracy
Scale Support Operations: Enable the existing team to handle 3x the support volume
Improve User Experience: Increase customer satisfaction scores by at least 20%
Enhance Knowledge Management: Create a unified, self-updating knowledge system
Technical Solution
After evaluating FastFinance's needs, we designed a comprehensive AI customer support system with several integrated components:
1. Unified Knowledge System
The first challenge was consolidating FastFinance's fragmented knowledge sources. We developed an automated knowledge ingestion pipeline that:
Extracted information from product documentation, internal wikis, compliance guidelines, and past support tickets
Processed and normalized content using domain-specific NLP techniques
Created a hierarchical knowledge structure organized by product, feature, and topic
Established automated update mechanisms to capture new information
2. Advanced RAG Implementation
At the core of the solution was our FinRAG system—a specialized implementation of Retrieval-Augmented Generation tailored for financial services:
Domain-Specific Embeddings: We fine-tuned embedding models on financial terminology to improve semantic search accuracy
Initial broad retrieval to identify relevant knowledge areas
Focused retrieval within those areas for specific information
Contextual retrieval to gather supporting details
Dynamic Context Management: The system intelligently prioritized and organized retrieved information based on relevance and importance
Compliant with financial regulations
3. Human-in-the-Loop Workflows
We designed integrated workflows that balanced automation with human expertise:
Confidence-Based Routing: The system automatically handled high-confidence responses while routing complex or uncertain cases to specialists
Suggestion Mode: For specialist-handled tickets, the AI provided draft responses and relevant information snippets
Feedback Loop: Every human edit or override was captured to improve the system's future responses
Continuous Learning: The system regularly retrained on successful support interactions and new knowledge
4. Omnichannel Integration
The solution integrated with FastFinance's existing support channels:
Web chat widget with real-time responses
Email integration with Zendesk
Voice support system providing talking points for phone agents
Self-service knowledge base with AI-powered search
5. Analytics-Driven Improvement
We implemented comprehensive monitoring to ensure quality and identify improvement opportunities:
Real-time accuracy monitoring with random human verification
Customer satisfaction tracking through post-interaction surveys
Knowledge Base Quality: 85% reduction in knowledge inconsistencies through automated verification
Performance dashboards for support team managers
Implementation Process
Discovery and Analysis

We began with a comprehensive analysis of FastFinance's support operations, including a full audit of their knowledge base, support processes, and common customer inquiries. This phase included interviews with support specialists and analysis of 5,000+ historical support interactions.
Knowledge System Development

We developed the knowledge ingestion pipeline and created the initial unified knowledge base. This included custom parsers for FastFinance's documentation formats and automated verification processes to ensure information accuracy.
FinRAG System Development

We built and fine-tuned the specialized RAG system for financial support queries. This included embedding model selection and training, retrieval optimization, and prompt engineering for accurate response generation.
Pilot Testing
We conducted a controlled pilot with a subset of support tickets. Four support specialists worked with the system in shadow mode, evaluating response quality and providing feedback for refinement.
Integration and Workflow Development

We integrated the system with FastFinance's support channels and implemented the human-in-the-loop workflows. This included custom development for Zendesk integration and training for the support team.
Full Deployment and Optimization

We launched the complete system across all support channels and implemented the analytics suite. The first month included daily optimization sessions to refine the system based on real-world performance.
Results and Impact
The impact of the AI customer support system was immediately apparent and continued to improve over time:
Operational Improvements
Response Time: Average first response time decreased from 8 hours to just 1.75 hours (78% reduction)
Resolution Rate: 65% of tickets resolved without human intervention, rising to 72% by the third month
Support NPS: Improved from +15 to +62
Customer Experience Improvements
Satisfaction Scores: CSAT scores increased from 72% to 92% (42% improvement)
Self-Service Rate: 38% increase in customers resolving issues through the knowledge base
Repeat Interactions: 45% reduction in customers needing multiple contacts to resolve an issue
Additionally, the system created several unexpected benefits:
Identifying patterns in human-edited responses
Provided valuable training examples for new support specialists
Generated insights for product development team

"The Divinci AI solution has completely transformed how we think about customer support. We were initially skeptical about AI handling our financial support queries due to complexity and compliance requirements, but the results have exceeded our expectations in every way. Our team is more efficient, our customers are happier, and we've gained valuable insights into our product. The human-in-the-loop approach gives us the perfect balance of automation and human expertise."
Samantha Tobia
Head of Customer Experience, FastFinance
Key Learnings and Best Practices
Through our work with FastFinance, we identified several critical success factors for implementing AI customer support systems in financial services:
1. Domain-Specific Training Is Essential

General-purpose language models, even with RAG capabilities, were insufficient for financial support. Domain-specific fine-tuning with financial terminology and use cases improved accuracy by over 30% compared to off-the-shelf solutions.
2. Thoughtful Human-AI Collaboration
The most successful approach was not fully automated or human-only, but a carefully designed collaboration where:
AI handled routine queries and information gathering
Specialists focused on complex cases, relationship building, and quality assurance
The system learned from human interventions to continuously improve
3. Multi-Stage Retrieval for Complex Domains

Single-stage retrieval wasn't sufficient for complex financial questions that often required information from multiple knowledge areas. The multi-stage approach improved relevant information retrieval by 45%.
4. Verification Mechanisms for High-Stakes Content

For financial services organizations facing similar support challenges, this case study provides a proven framework for implementing AI-powered support that enhances both operational efficiency and customer experience.
Factually accurate based on source documentation
Consistent with FastFinance's policies
Appropriately cautious when uncertainty existed
The system's performance improved over time through a structured analytics approach:
Tracking which knowledge sources led to successful resolutions
Analyzing customer follow-up questions to detect gaps
Regular retraining cycles with verified high-quality interactions
Conclusion

The FastFinance implementation demonstrates the transformative potential of custom AI solutions for specialized support functions. By combining advanced RAG technology with domain expertise and thoughtful human-AI workflows, we were able to help FastFinance dramatically scale their support operations while improving quality.

The key to success wasn't just sophisticated technology, but a careful understanding of the financial domain, support workflows, and customer needs. This holistic approach enabled us to design a solution that balanced automation with human expertise, creating a system that continuously improves over time.

blog/posts/building-responsible-ai-syste.blog/posts/building-responsible-ai-syste: Building Responsible AI Systems: A Practical Guide
By Paul-Marie Carfantan
Back to Blog

As artificial intelligence becomes increasingly embedded in software systems and business operations, the importance of building these systems responsibly has never been more critical. Organizations are now recognizing that responsible AI isn't just an ethical imperative—it's a business necessity that directly impacts customer trust, regulatory compliance, and long-term sustainability.

At Divinci AI, we've built responsible AI considerations into the core of our platform. Our tools for model validation, explainability, data governance, and monitoring help organizations implement these principles efficiently, without sacrificing innovation or time-to-market.
A comprehensive responsible AI framework addresses fairness, transparency, privacy, and safety throughout the AI lifecycle.
Why Responsible AI Matters
AI systems should be robust, reliable, and behave as expected even in edge cases. This requires:
Real-world harm if systems discriminate against certain groups or individuals
Legal and regulatory risk as AI-specific regulations continue to emerge globally
Reputational damage from AI systems that behave in ways that violate user trust
Reduce regulatory and reputational risks

Building responsible AI systems is both a technical and organizational challenge that requires intentional effort at every stage of development. By adopting a systematic approach to implementing ethical principles, organizations can create AI systems that deliver tremendous value while avoiding potential pitfalls.
Core Principles of Responsible AI
While there are many frameworks for responsible AI, most include these core principles:
1. Fairness and Non-discrimination
Regularly testing models for performance disparities across demographic groups
Implementing data minimization by only extracting necessary information
Evaluating and mitigating bias in training data before model development
Using inherently interpretable models when appropriate
Fairness Implementation Checklist
Define roles and responsibilities for responsible AI implementation and oversight.
Identify potential sources of bias in your data and model development process
Test across diverse scenarios including edge cases and adversarial examples.
Document data provenance and limitations to ensure transparency about how training data was collected and processed.
2. Transparency and Explainability

Users should understand when they're interacting with AI systems, and stakeholders should be able to understand how these systems make decisions. Different contexts require different levels of explanation:
High-stakes decisions require detailed, case-specific explanations
Lower-risk applications may need only general information about how the system works
Different stakeholders (users, developers, auditors) need different types of explanations
In practice, this means choosing appropriate explainability methods based on your model and use case:
Feature importance metrics for traditional ML models
Local interpretability methods like LIME or SHAP for complex models
Clear communication of system capabilities and limitations in the introduction
A quality assurance pipeline with model explainability components to provide transparency at different levels.
3. Privacy and Security
Minimize data collection to what's necessary for the specific purpose
Incorporate privacy-enhancing technologies like differential privacy or federated learning
Have clear data governance policies for all stages of the AI lifecycle
Common Privacy Pitfalls
Even well-intentioned AI systems can inadvertently compromise privacy. Be aware of these common issues:
Membership inference attacks that determine if data was used to train a model
Model inversion attacks that can reconstruct training data
Unintentional memorization of sensitive information in large language models
Data leakage through explanations that reveal private information
4. Safety and Reliability
Rigorous testing across diverse conditions and inputs
Graceful handling of unexpected inputs or system failures
Appropriate human oversight and intervention mechanisms
Ongoing monitoring for performance degradation or unexpected behavior
For systems with potential safety implications, additional measures are necessary:
Red teaming to identify potential vulnerabilities or harmful outputs
Content filtering and safety measures to prevent misuse
Fallback mechanisms that degrade gracefully rather than failing completely
5. Human Agency and Oversight
Finally, responsible AI systems respect human autonomy and include appropriate human oversight. This means:
Design data governance protocols for data collection, storage, use, and retention.
Providing confidence scores for extracted information
Creating escalation paths to human support when necessary
Ensuring humans have final accountability for important decisions
Implementing Responsible AI Across the Development Lifecycle
Moving from principles to practice requires integrating responsible AI considerations throughout the entire AI development lifecycle. Here's a practical framework for doing this:
Planning and Design
Conduct regular audits to ensure continued compliance with responsible AI practices.
Establish clear policies and standards for ethical AI development across your organization.
Questions for Ethical Impact Assessment
Who are the stakeholders affected by this AI system?
What potential harms could arise from this system's use or misuse?
How could the system impact different groups of people unequally?
What level of explainability is required given the system's impact?
What data privacy and security considerations should be addressed?
What oversight mechanisms are appropriate for this system?
Data Collection and Preparation
Audit training data for potential biases or underrepresented groups.
Apply quality filters to knowledge sources before indexing
Model Development and Testing
Select model architectures that provide appropriate levels of explainability for your use case.
Validate performance across demographic groups to identify and mitigate disparate impact.
Generate model explanations using appropriate techniques for your model architecture.
Deployment and Monitoring
Create sustainable long-term value rather than short-term gains with potential backlash
Practical Approaches for Common AI Applications
Different AI applications present different ethical challenges. Here are specific considerations for some common AI use cases:
Responsible AI for Document Processing
Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems present unique ethical considerations:
Misinformation risks from hallucinations or outdated information sources
Attribution transparency for where information comes from
Source quality and bias in the knowledge base used for retrieval
Privacy concerns when retrieving from sensitive documents
To address these concerns:
Include confidence scores or uncertainty indicators with responses
For AI assistants that interact directly with users:
Transparency about AI identity - users should know they're interacting with an AI
Setting appropriate expectations about capabilities and limitations
Handling sensitive conversations with care and appropriate boundaries
Data privacy concerns related to sensitive information in documents
Implementing responsible AI practices at scale requires an organizational governance framework:
Applying rigorous security measures for conversation data
When using AI to process documents and extract information:
Accuracy and verification of extracted information
Bias in information extraction based on document format or language
Intellectual property considerations for processed documents
Practical approaches include:
Testing with diverse document formats and structures
Responsible AI Governance
Build trust with customers and stakeholders
Develop documentation practices that create accountability throughout the AI lifecycle.
An effective governance framework ensures that responsible AI isn't just the concern of dedicated ethics teams, but is integrated into every aspect of AI development and deployment.
Balancing Innovation with Responsibility

It's important to note that responsible AI isn't about slowing innovation—it's about ensuring that innovation benefits everyone. By integrating ethical considerations from the beginning of development, companies can build better products that:
Serve more diverse users effectively and equitably
The most innovative AI companies recognize that responsibility and innovation go hand in hand—responsible practices lead to more robust, trusted, and ultimately more successful AI systems.
Conclusion: The Path Forward

As AI continues to transform our world, the organizations that succeed will be those that embrace responsibility as a competitive advantage—creating AI systems that users trust, that regulators approve, and that benefit society as a whole.
